name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: MSExchange Transport Agent Installation
notes:
This building block detects the installation of a Transport Agent in Exchange.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Tobias Michalski
SIGMA Title: MSExchange Transport Agent Installation - Builtin
SIGMA Description: Detects the Installation of a Exchange Transport Agent


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: MSExchange Transport Agent Installation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of Install-TransportAgent
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: MSExchange Transport Agent Installation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Success, System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Command (custom) contains any of Install-TransportAgent
